hub.name: TizWildin Entertainment HUB
hub.description: Updater, version controller, and downloader for every free plugin edition in the ecosystem.

plugins.name: FreeEQ8
plugins.description: Free open-source 8-band parametric EQ with dynamic EQ, linear phase, match EQ, per-band drive, M/S, oversampling, and spectrum analyzer.

plugins.name: Instrudio
plugins.description: 10 fully playable instruments — cross-platform instrument ecosystem with hybrid HTML/plugin architecture.

plugins.name: XyloCore
plugins.description: Playable xylophone / tuned-percussion instrument with velocity-mapped samples and keyboard control.

plugins.name: BassMaid
plugins.description: Bass enhancement and low-end processing toolkit.

plugins.name: SpaceMaid
plugins.description: Spatial audio processing — depth, width, and reverb tools.

plugins.name: GlueMaid
plugins.description: Mix bus glue and cohesion tool — compression and tonal shaping.

plugins.name: MixMaid
plugins.description: Real-time spectral balance and mix correction — gently guides mixes toward balanced tonal distribution, proper headroom, and controlled dynamics.

plugins.name: ChainMaid
plugins.description: Sidechain plugin — clean sidechain ducking and pumping effects for EDM, trap, and mix engineering.

plugins.name: MultiMaid
plugins.description: Focused multiband dynamics plugin for the Maid suite — deliberately non-overlapping with FreeEQ8, GlueMaid, MixMaid, BassMaid, SpaceMaid, ChainMaid, and MeterMaid.

plugins.name: MeterMaid
plugins.description: Single-plugin mastering + metering suite: BS.1770-4 K-weighted loudness, EBU R128 gated integration, 4× oversampled true peak, spectrogram, chromagram, goniometer, and an octagonal target radar.

plugins.name: PaintMask
plugins.description: Visual paint-based audio processing — shape sound with brush strokes, splashes, and geometry that become MIDI patterns.

plugins.name: WURP
plugins.description: Toxic Motion Engine — mutates audio with formant motion, corrosive saturation, elastic pitch, and reactive animated UI.

plugins.name: AETHER
plugins.description: Choir & atmosphere designer for cinematic sound design — procedural choirs, pads, and evolving textures.

plugins.name: WhisperGate
plugins.description: Procedural whispers, ghost choirs, and ritual atmospheres through an interactive geometry interface.

plugins.name: Therum
plugins.description: Bootleg Serum — free wavetable synthesizer with visual waveform editing and modulation.

plugins.name: RiftWave Suite
plugins.description: Modular synth engine + waveform synthesis — RiftSynth + WaveForm in Lite and Pro editions.

plugins.name: VF-PlexLab
plugins.description: VocalForge PersonaPlex Lab — JUCE plugin + local backend + HTML tester around NVIDIA PersonaPlex for voice-conditioned vocal asset generation, spoken hooks, whispers, chants, and sample-pack export.

plugins.name: PAP-Forge-Audio
plugins.description: Procedural Autonomous Plugins runtime for generating, branching, mutating, validating, and restoring plugin projects from natural-language sound intent.
